task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Q4_Audit' folder has been moved from the Trash to the root of 'Local Folders'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Thunderbird folder pane on the left, 'Q4_Audit' appears as a direct child of 'Local Folders' and is no longer located under 'Trash'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Q4_Audit' folder is selected to display its contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q4_Audit' folder is highlighted in the folder pane, and its emails are visible in the main message list pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that all emails within the 'Q4_Audit' folder are marked as unread.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the message list for 'Q4_Audit', all emails indicate an unread status (typically shown by bold text, a filled green dot, or a specific unread icon in the status column).

task_completion.description: Verify that the email with the subject 'URGENT: Missing Signatures' is starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The star icon next to the email with the exact subject 'URGENT: Missing Signatures' is filled/highlighted in the message list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Thunderbird application has been closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots, the Thunderbird application window is no longer visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Thunderbird graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Thunderbird application being clicked and navigated, rather than terminal windows being used to move files or edit mailbox data.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use command-line tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be visible executing commands like 'mv', 'cp', or 'sed' on the Thunderbird profile directories.

integrity.description: Verify that the unread and star statuses were changed via the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The toggling of the star and unread status should be visible within the Thunderbird message list interface, not through a text editor modifying the raw mailbox file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target folder to be recovered is exactly 'Q4_Audit'. The critical email that must be starred has the exact subject 'URGENT: Missing Signatures'.
